response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches the provided lyrics for 'FG ROADSTER' by FLOW GLOW perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics were fully utilized to construct precise Japanese transcription and highly accurate English translations. 3. Timing & Pacing: No vocals are present until the performance begins at 02:13. The timestamps are tightly bound to the rapid-fire rap delivery, using instantaneous transitions to eliminate cascading delays.

subtitles.original: This is FLOW GLOW in countdown live! 来年もよろしくー！
subtitles.english: This is FLOW GLOW in Countdown Live! Look forward to next year too!
Packin' a V8 engine
And a seventh sense for things
Six ways to Sunday, this world and all humanity

subtitles.original: この5人でゲームをチェンジ
subtitles.english: With us five, we change the game
Fire up the roaring four wheels

subtitles.original: 皆さん3キューサランヘヨ
subtitles.english: Thank you all three-fold, saranghae yo
Spinning two turntables
Becoming number one, starting here, Ground Zero
Face the risks and stand up

subtitles.original: チャンスもセットだ当然
subtitles.english: Chances naturally come as a set
Going to the top, all the way up
Stacking cushions like Shoten
Jumping into an FG Roadster
We got a special unit full of espers

subtitles.original: この歴史に名を彫る彫刻家
subtitles.english: Sculptors carving our names in history

subtitles.original: ぶっちぎりで置き去り後続車
subtitles.english: Leaving any slower cars in the dust

subtitles.original: 今高速でぶち抜けていく大気圏
subtitles.english: Speeding through the stratosphere at high speed

subtitles.original: エンジンからジェットの炎揺れている怪気炎
subtitles.english: Our jet engines' thrusting flame is roaring

subtitles.original: 眼下に広がる大地を越えていく回帰線
subtitles.english: Crossing the tropics over the expanding earth below

subtitles.original: バックミラーにbig blueが写っているibm
subtitles.english: Seeing the big blue in the rearview, IBM

subtitles.original: 打ち上げ台から飛んでく
subtitles.english: Taking off from the launch pad
This fuel is for our generation

subtitles.original: 朽ち果てないです銀河で
subtitles.english: We won't decay in the galaxy
I wanna eat sushi

subtitles.original: 見えてるでかいビジョン
subtitles.english: We got a massive vision in sight

subtitles.original: 燃えてるメンバー一同
subtitles.english: All of us burning with passion
And as of this moment, actively progressing
Going above and beyond on a global scale
Dreams come true, we won't stop
Our hearts are a monster
Aliens, turn it up
FG, party hard
Shining Tesla Roadster
Heavy booster

subtitles.original: 目覚めていく本能 青い炎
subtitles.english: Awakening our instincts, blue flame

subtitles.original: bff let's go out, so get in the car
subtitles.english: BFF, let's go out, so get in the car
Unshackled from zero to the universe
Speeding the FG Roadster
Roaring booster

subtitles.original: flow glow the space to be
subtitles.english: FLOW GLOW, the space to be
Now chase me

subtitles.original: ターボ付きスーパーカー
subtitles.english: A turbocharged supercar

subtitles.original: ハンドル捌きはシューマッハ
subtitles.english: And handling like Schumacher

subtitles.original: 副操縦士はチューバッカ
subtitles.english: Co-driver is Chewbacca

subtitles.original: 次元が違う連中ばっか
subtitles.english: Just a bunch of folks from a different dimension

subtitles.original: コーナー攻めてるギリギリ
subtitles.english: Braking at the last minute
Motors at full throttle, shaking the ground
A lead from the sky
Our skin is so bouncy

subtitles.original: タイヤ焦がしてドーナツターン
subtitles.english: Tires smoking during a donut turn

subtitles.original: 弾け飛んでくドラム缶
subtitles.english: Sending barrels flying up
High customer satisfaction

subtitles.original: ぶち上がってるお客さん
subtitles.english: Crowd is going nuts
Going from zero to the highest peak
Charged up on solar power
Exploring this asteroid

subtitles.original: 超覚醒突入ボーナスステージ
subtitles.english: Hit the super-awakened bonus stage
A road stretching in a straight line
Vibration, the engine's heartbeat

subtitles.original: 速度増し上がってる高度
subtitles.english: Speed going up, rising altitude
Shaking off our limits and gravity, we soar

subtitles.original: 開拓しまくってくフロンティア
subtitles.english: Terraforming the frontier
The roadster is the only pioneer

subtitles.original: アクセル踏み込んでくドンピシャ
subtitles.english: Putting the pedal to the metal with perfect timing
Flying past Japanese heritages
The bass packs a billion horsepower

subtitles.original: 火星のホテルが休憩所
subtitles.english: A hotel on Mars is our rest room
As the UFOs race in space

subtitles.original: 降り立つ宇宙ステーション
subtitles.english: Landing on the space station
Continuing the story
Like the Old Testament
For centuries, we'll have all the glory

subtitles.original: 生き延びて結果出すtake off
subtitles.english: To survive and make our mark, take off!
Dreams come true, we won't stop
Our hearts are a monster
Aliens, turn it up
FG, party hard
Shining Tesla Roadster
Heavy booster

subtitles.original: 目覚めていく本能 青い炎
subtitles.english: Awakening our instincts, blue flame

subtitles.original: bff let's go out, so get in the car
subtitles.english: BFF, let's go out, so get in the car
Unshackled from zero to the universe
Speeding the FG Roadster
Roaring booster
